project_info_title: Contemporary residences in Jumeirah Village Circle
project_info_text:
Sky Harmony by Peace Homes introduces a contemporary residential address in Jumeirah Village Circle, combining elegant design, practical layouts and a lifestyle-focused setting within one of Dubai’s most active communities.

The project brings together studios, one-bedroom residences, two-bedroom apartments and limited penthouses, complemented by curated amenities and a strong investment-oriented positioning in JVC.
amenities_title: Infrastructure and landscaping of the residential complex
project_summary_subtitle: Design-led residences with lifestyle amenities and strong investor appeal
summary_developer_value: Peace Homes presented by Svetlana Gorbova
map_text:
Located in Jumeirah Village Circle, Sky Harmony enjoys a central Dubai address with quick access to major highways and key destinations across the city.

Residents benefit from proximity to Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, Downtown Dubai, Dubai Mall, airports and a growing residential environment shaped by parks, schools, retail and everyday convenience.
